candidate_summary: Information-cascade form mapping kombucha SCOBY's stratified microbial succession (yeasts then AAB depositing baby-on-mother pellicle layers) onto multi-agent LLM teams whose time-ordered, stratigraphic output record makes role-emergence auditable.

results.title: Nature of back slopping kombucha fermentation: microbial succession, metabolites composition changes
results.judge_reason: Direct empirical source of source-domain mechanism (yeasts then AAB succession, pH drop) cited in candidate.

results.title: SCOBY (Wikipedia)
results.judge_reason: Establishes the SCOBY pellicle interphase substrate that anchors the candidate's source-domain analogy.

results.title: Multi-Agent LLM Systems: From Emergent Collaboration to Structured Collective Intelligence
results.judge_reason: Frames multi-agent LLM properties as emergent from communication topology + memory substrate, directly relevant to LLM-side framing.

results.title: Drop the Hierarchy and Roles: How Self-Organizing LLM Agents Outperform Designed Structures
results.judge_reason: Explicitly named in candidate's novelty_claim; addresses endogenous role specialization that the SCOBY metaphor reframes.

results.title: Emergent Coordination in Multi-Agent Language Models (Riedl)
results.judge_reason: Snippet thin but directly tied to candidate's cited prior work on emergent multi-agent coordination.

results.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration Mechanisms: A Survey of LLMs
results.judge_reason: Surveys role specialization and emergent behaviors in multi-agent LLM coordination, covering the candidate's LLM-side terrain.

results.title: AgentNet: Decentralized Evolutionary Coordination
results.judge_reason: Named in novelty_claim; agents dynamically specialize and reorganize, the core LLM phenomenon the SCOBY frame reinterprets.

results.title: LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems for SE: Literature Review (ACM TOSEM)
results.judge_reason: SE-scoped survey of multi-agent role specialization; relevant but tangential to the auditing-stratigraphy claim.

verdict: Strong corpus support: all 8 results hit, with balanced coverage of source-side (SCOBY/kombucha succession) and LLM-side (emergent multi-agent role specialization). Candidate's novelty depends on whether the stratigraphic/audit-trail reframing is genuinely absent from the cited literature; no result directly preempts the layered-record-as-audit framing.
